name: Moon Interaction And Navigation Cleanup
outcome_goal: Moon interaction model matches the agreed UX: single-click drawer, double-click full detail, standard zoom/pan, no chooser overlays on established nodes, native deletion, and Cost Summary removed from primary nav.
anti_requirements: Do not remove the Cost Summary route if deep links still depend on it; only remove it from primary shell navigation.
Do not make single-click open the full node popout.
Do not add broad shell/navigation refactors outside Moon and shell registry.

jobs.label: discover_moon_interactions
jobs.prompt: Inspect MoonBuildPage, reducer tests, dock authority tests, node chooser behavior, canvas event handlers, and shell surface registry. Classify dirty changes as keep, revert, or repair.

jobs.label: repair_click_and_detail_model
jobs.prompt: Implement the interaction contract. SELECT_NODE selects only. Single-click opens context/action drawer. Double-click dispatches OPEN_POPOUT. Established/designated nodes must not auto-open chooser overlays.

jobs.label: repair_canvas_controls_and_deletion
jobs.prompt: Implement standard canvas controls and native deletion. Wheel/trackpad scroll zooms around pointer; drag empty canvas pans; selected node/edge can be removed from active workflow state through existing mutation authority.

jobs.label: remove_cost_summary_primary_nav
jobs.prompt: Remove Cost Summary from primary shell tabs and global navigation. Keep secondary/deep-link route only if existing registry behavior requires it.

jobs.label: test_moon_interaction_navigation_cleanup
jobs.prompt: Restore and expand interaction/navigation tests. Prove single-click drawer, double-click popout, no chooser overlay for established nodes, canvas zoom/pan, deletion mutation intent, and Cost Summary absence from primary nav.
